label: Customer Service
description: Support, complaints, refunds, issue resolution, and service recovery.

label: Healthcare
description: Medical QA, clinical documentation, triage assistance, and safety-sensitive support.

description: Contract review, legal research, compliance, and policy interpretation.

label: Education
description: Tutoring, assessment, course support, and learning feedback.

label: Software Engineering
description: Coding agents, issue resolution, repository navigation, and release work.

label: Research
description: Literature review, synthesis, citation grounding, and data analysis.

label: Procurement
description: Vendor comparison, purchasing workflows, and contract intake.

label: Human Resources
description: Recruiting, onboarding, policy support, and employee service workflows.

label: E-commerce
description: Shopping assistance, order support, product QA, and returns.

label: Logistics

label: Manufacturing
description: Operations, maintenance, quality control, and supply-chain workflows.

label: Government
description: Public services, policy guidance, citizen support, and open data workflows.

label: General
description: Cross-domain datasets and benchmarks with no specific industry focus.
